arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool transfer target is available for only £19m in January
arts.sum: Liverpool have still not made any new signing in the January transfer window and only two weeks are left for the window to shut down. The Reds had a quiet summer transfer window in which only Federico Chiesa arrived at the club.
